title: AI Pigeon Doctor Walking Down Hallway
about: Pigeon Doctor Walking Down Hallway or Tuff Pigeon Doctor is a series of memes based on an AI-assisted video of a humanoid pigeon doctor walking dramatically down a T-Mobile Arena hallway. The video was originally posted by TikToker @doctor_pigeon in early January 2026. The video spread over the following weeks as the subject of memes about the life of a doctor and playing off the dramatic atmosphere of the video. As the video continued to go viral, videos referencing it indirectly started going viral on Instagram Reels and TikTok. The video is an AI-assisted edit of Conor McGregor walking down a hallway at T-Moblie Arena.
origin:
On January 8th, 2026, TikToker [1] @doctor_pigeon, an account dedicated to AI-generated videos of a pigeon doctor, posted a video of a humanoid pigeon walking dramatically down a hallways at T-Mobile Arena with a group of people behind him. The video garnered over 8.9 million views in a month.

The video is an AI-assisted edit of Conor McGregor walking down a hallway at T-Moblie Arena, possibly created using Viggle AI or a similar tool.
